bluertopo: Download and extract NOAA BlueTopo bathymetry with terra

Source: R/package.R
bluertopo-package.Rd

bluertopo discovers NOAA BlueTopo source tiles, downloads original GeoTIFF/RAT assets with checksum validation, and opens selected raster bands as file-backed terra objects.

See also

Useful links:

  • https://el-cordero.github.io/bluer-topo/

  • https://github.com/el-cordero/bluer-topo

  • Report bugs at https://github.com/el-cordero/bluer-topo/issues
